definition.name: near-fixed-algebra
definition.definition: Near-fixed algebra A = Im P = Ker(1-P) subset B(H)_sa, a real subspace containing 1, with projected Jordan product a•b := P(a o b) for a,b in A. For a in A, a=P(a). Order, unit, order-unit norm inherited exactly from B(H)_sa. def-near-fixed-algebra.
